name: canvas-particle-field
title: Canvas Particle Field
description: A canvas particle field draws dozens-to-hundreds of drifting dots into a 2D pixel buffer as ambient backdrop texture. Tier ③ in `knowledge/expressive-stack.md`: at this element count, DOM nodes pay layout/paint cost per node while the canvas pays none. An experimental/showcase touch (signature principle 5) — hero and event surfaces on request, never behind forms or data UI.
docs: Recipe contract (intent/anatomy/tokens/checks/anti-patterns): https://ui.askewly.com/llms/recipes/application-ui/canvas-particle-field.md — after transplant, remap look to the project's own tokens per https://ui.askewly.com/llms/docs/design-system/component-restyle.md
